items.claim: Tommy McMillan has a 5-inch height advantage over Alberto Montes.
Tommy McMillan has a 5-inch reach advantage over Alberto Montes.
Alberto Montes is a significant submission threat even without landing takedowns.
items.quote: Alberto Montes can submit you without even landing takedowns.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has poor takedown defense at 25%.
items.quote: Ramirez 25% takedown defense. That's not good.

items.claim: Chase Hooper is more active on the feet than Mitch Ramirez.
items.quote: 4.5 significant strikes per minute to 3.5 for Ramirez.

items.claim: Chase Hooper has a superior takedown game compared to Mitch Ramirez.
items.quote: The takedown game leans towards Hooper as well.

items.claim: Chase Hooper is still in a developmental phase where he improves significantly with each fight due to his age.
items.quote: every time you see him right now, he's getting better and better and better.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier is in the later stages of his career due to his age.
items.quote: the only tricky part of this fight is that Cantoner is getting older
